title: CI Run Record
description: A single per-workflow health record emitted by ci-emit-health.yml in CI_Toolkit and dispatched to CI_Health_Dashboard via repository_dispatch.

repository.description: Full 'org/repo' identifier of the source repository.

workflow.description: Name of the CI workflow that emitted this record (e.g. ci-build).

trigger.description: GitHub Actions event name that triggered the run.

ref.description: Destination branch (base_ref for PRs, ref_name for push).

pr_number.description: Pull request number (empty for non-PR triggers).

run_url.description: Full URL to the GitHub Actions run.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the emit-health job ran.

repository.description: Full 'org/repo' identifier of the source repository.

sha.description: Full commit SHA that was tested.

ref.description: The destination branch this run contributes health data to (github.base_ref for PRs, github.ref_name for push). Always a branch name, never a PR ref.

trigger.description: Semantic routing trigger computed by emit-health. 'pr-to-branch' means a PR targeting develop/main whose merge-commit run is treated as branch-authoritative state.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the emit-health job ran.

run_url.description: Full URL to the GitHub Actions run page.

maturity.description: Maturity tier of the repo as determined by policy.json in DevOps_Toolkit.

overall.description: Rolled-up CI result. 'failure' if any job failed or was cancelled; 'success' if all ran jobs passed.

jobs.description: Per-job results keyed by job name.
